TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_demec_nu_palaw_nu_Incumin-_Haysin_cacudadan, title = u_demec_nu_palaw_nu_Incumin-_Haysin_cacudadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_demec_nu_palaw_nu_Incumin-_Haysin_cacudadan} }

S.FORM: u demec nu palaw nu Incumin- Haysin cacudadan Haysin cacudadan itiza i Kalingku, tayza micanka tu demec nu palw nu Incumin, malakapahay a demec.mipalaw tu Sakizayaay a kungku. u nuayaway a palaw.
S.PHON: u dəməʦ nu par~ɾaw nu inʦumin- ħajsin ʦaʦudadan ħajsin ʦaʦudadan itiza i kar~ɾiŋku, tajza miʦanka tu dəməʦ nu par~ɾw nu inʦumin, mar~ɾakapaħaj a dəməʦ.mipar~ɾaw tu sakizajaaj a kuŋku. u nuajawaj a par~ɾaw.
S.FORM: u demec nu palaw nu Incumin- Haysin cacudadan Haysin cacudadan itiza i Kalingku, tayza micanka tu demec nu palw nu Incumin, malakapahay a demec.mipalaw tu Sakizayaay a kungku. u nuayaway a palaw.
S.PHON: u dəməʦ nu par~ɾaw nu inʦumin- ħajsin ʦaʦudadan ħajsin ʦaʦudadan itiza i kar~ɾiŋku, tajza miʦanka tu dəməʦ nu par~ɾw nu inʦumin, mar~ɾakapaħaj a dəməʦ.mipar~ɾaw tu sakizajaaj a kuŋku. u nuajawaj a par~ɾaw.
